mustPass: Include clear paths to contact on home, products-services, sustainability and contact pages.
Reflect both sides of the industry when relevant: fiske, vattenbruk, försäljning, leverans or related service work.
Use concrete operational language rather than abstract agency-style marketing copy.
Support trust-building through transparent process, references and visible company information.
Allow the site to work for both B2B and consumer-facing operators depending on dossier data.
All routes from routes.json are present.
No lorem ipsum or sample placeholder copy.
Generated code typechecks and the project builds.
avoid: Do not assume a restaurant, webshop or tourism business unless the source content supports it.
Do not invent species, catch areas, volumes, certifications or sustainability claims.
Do not force pricing, booking or opening hours if the business does not publish them.
Do not overuse generic environmental claims without evidence.
Do not duplicate the same trust points on every page.
